name: Pohnpei State (Micronesia)

colors.symbolism: the sakau (kava) cup made from a coconut shell

description: A blue field with a wreath of green coconut leaves enclosing eleven white five-pointed stars, above a brown sakau cup made from half a coconut shell.
history: Pohnpei is the largest island and seat of the national capital of the Federated States of Micronesia. Its flag was first adopted in December 1977; the number of stars was changed from six to eleven in 1992 to represent the state's eleven municipalities.
